sources.title: La Venganza De Los Punks ( 1991) PT SUBS
sources.description: PORTUGUESE SUBS WARNING: THEMES OF SEXUAL VIOLENCE, NUDITY AND VIOLENT CONTENT FOR ADULTS ONLY! 18+ PLOT: A Charles Bronson look-alike takes on a gaggle of punks terrorizing a small town.

metadata.Plot: After breaking out of jail, our fearless punks go after their arch-nemesis, pudgy federal agent Marco. After ruining his daughters birthday party, the punks head back to their hideout. Little do they know that vengeance awaits them, flabby Mexican vengeance.
metadata.Actors: Juan Valentín, Olga Rios, Bruno Rey
